jobs.title: Manager, Software Engineering - Billing
jobs.content: <p>Billing is a full stack engineering group automating revenue workflows and building end-to-end payment and billing capabilities for all of Figma's customers.</p><p>This is a full time role that can be held from one of our US hubs or remotely in the United States.</p><p>We'd love to hear from you if you have 4+ years of experience hiring and leading teams as an engineering manager.</p>

location.name: San Francisco, CA • New York, NY • United States
